title: woodsia scopulina
intro: Woodsia scopulina, also known as Mountain Woodsia, is a rare species of fern native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Woodsia scopulina include soothing sore throats, reducing swelling and pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Woodsia scopulina typically involve drying the leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant in tincture or salve form to apply topically to affected areas.
